text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold City's summer camp has come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I don't fully trust your
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm being serious. Although, I do feel I got
something out of this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm starting to look forward to the Kikuka
Sho. I'll try to make them...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, I'll definitely make them say the words I want to hear!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tama! How many more laps are you gonna
run?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Time to get ready—you're gonna miss the bus!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: This is it! I got it! I found da key to victory!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who's looked down on me's 'bout to find
out who I really am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, summer camp—filled with its whirlwind of
emotions—comes to an end.
